.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add a placeholder for the Chromatic project token to the environment sample file.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch base image from Maven-bundled JDK 11 to a standalone JDK 21 Alpine image to support Java 21 runtime.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 features or compatibility; running on JDK 11 would cause runtime incompatibility or missing API errors for Java 21 code.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian-based package manager (apt-get) with Alpine's package manager (apk) to match the new base image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which does not have apt-get; using apt-get would result in a build failure.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Node.js using nvm instead of the NodeSource setup script to ensure compatibility with the Alpine environment and specific version control.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous NodeSource script and apt-get installation method are incompatible with Alpine Linux and do not provide the required Node.js version management.
Dockerfile.before:
curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_12.x | bash - \
  && apt-get install -y nodejs

Dockerfile.general_idea: Remove Heroku CLI installation as it is no longer needed or compatible with the new build strategy.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The Heroku CLI installation script is specific to Ubuntu/Debian and is not required for the new Docker build process.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add Maven installation via apk since the base image no longer bundles Maven.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is a plain JDK image, so Maven must be explicitly installed to build the application.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add libstdc++ dependency required for native libraries or tools in the Alpine environment.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Some Java native libraries or build tools may require libstdc++ to run correctly on Alpine Linux.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the entrypoint to run the specific application JAR file instead of a generic bash shell.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous CMD was a placeholder; the new configuration correctly starts the Spring Boot application.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add steps to copy source code and build the application within the Docker image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous Dockerfile did not build the application; the new one includes the build process to create a self-contained image.
Dockerfile.after:
COPY src /home/app/src
COPY frontend /home/app/frontend
COPY lombok.config /home/app
COPY pom.xml /home/app

RUN mvn -B -Pproduction -Ph2 -DskipTests -f /home/app/pom.xml clean package

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image variable to reflect the new project name.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS (module.exports) to ES Modules (export default) to align with modern frontend tooling standards.
Update Storybook stories glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs files and remove the deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add the react-webpack5 framework configuration block required by newer Storybook versions.
Add staticDirs configuration to serve static assets from the public directory.
Add @storybook/addon-onboarding to the addons list for improved developer experience.
Add @chromatic-com/storybook to the addons list for visual regression testing integration.
Add @storybook/addon-interactions to the addons list for interaction testing support.
Remove custom webpack plugin configuration that failed the build on warnings, likely due to deprecation or change in build strategy.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.before: webpackFinal: async (config) => { config.plugins.push(new WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning()); return config; }

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Remove the require statement for the custom webpack plugin as it is no longer used.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Add import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Add logic to determine the correct URL for the Mock Service Worker script based on the environment.
Initialize the Mock Service Worker with the determined URL.
Wrap Story content with ToastContainer to render toast notifications.
Refactor Storybook preview configuration to use the modern default export object syntax.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin uses this property; leaving it at 17 prevents compilation of Java 21 features or causes warnings/errors depending on plugin config.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace changes); the application will fail to start or compile without a replacement API documentation library.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC version to 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x (compatible with Boot 2.6) is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.3; dependency resolution or runtime class conflicts will occur.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation dependency to bridge legacy validation API usage during migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 moves to Jakarta EE (jakarta.validation); if code still references javax.validation, it will fail at runtime or compile time without this bridge or code update.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update frontend-maven-plugin Node.js version from v12 to v16 in production profile.
pom.xml.why_exists: Node.js 12 is EOL and may not support modern frontend tooling required by the project; while not a Java compile error, it breaks the build process for the frontend assets.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Wiremock dependency for testing external service interactions.
Add Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add Pitest mutation testing plugin configuration.
Refactor pom.xml structure with comments and explicit section markers.
Add explicit mainClass configuration to spring-boot-maven-plugin and maven-jar-plugin.
Add surefire plugin configuration to fix test execution issues.
Add wiremock and integration profiles to pom.xml.
